jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer to join our team. You will be responsible for building and maintaining web applications using React and Node.js.
jobs.requirements:
5+ years of experience with React, Node.js, and SQL
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science
Experience with cloud platforms

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.description: Join our creative team to build amazing user interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS.
jobs.requirements:
3+ years of React experience
Tailwind CSS knowledge
Portfolio of previous work

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Help us build cutting-edge machine learning solutions to solve complex business problems.
jobs.requirements:
Python, SQL, Machine Learning experience
Master's degree preferred
3+ years experience

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: Design beautiful and intuitive user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
jobs.requirements:
Figma, Adobe Creative Suite
Portfolio required
3+ years experience

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Manage and scale our cloud infrastructure across multiple regions.
jobs.requirements:
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
CI/CD pipelines
5+ years experience

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Lead product development from concept to launch for our flagship products.
jobs.requirements:
5+ years product management
Agile experience
Technical background preferred
